all.en: Mark and I had been arguing about every detail of the report for two days.
all.zh: 馬克和我為了報告的每個細節爭論了兩天。

all.en: He insisted his approach was correct and dismissed my suggestions without listening.
all.zh: 他堅持自己的做法才對，連聽都不聽就否定我的建議。

all.en: I tried to stay calm, but his sarcastic comments started to wear me down.
all.zh: 我試著保持冷靜，但他諷刺的話語漸漸消磨我的耐心。

all.en: Other teammates avoided getting involved, leaving me to handle him alone.
all.zh: 其他同事都避免捲入，留下我獨自應付他。

all.en: I decided to invite him for coffee to clear the air privately.
all.zh: 我決定請他喝杯咖啡，私下把事情說清楚。

all.en: In the café, I explained that his tone made cooperation very difficult.
all.zh: 在咖啡廳，我向他說明他的語氣讓合作變得非常困難。

all.en: To my surprise, he admitted he had been stressed about a family issue.
all.zh: 出乎意料地，他坦承自己最近因家裡的事而壓力很大。

all.en: We agreed to give each other honest feedback without personal attacks.
all.zh: 我們同意以後給彼此誠實的回饋，不做人身攻擊。

all.en: Back at the office, we divided the report into sections that played to our strengths.
all.zh: 回到辦公室，我們把報告分成各自擅長的部分。

all.en: The atmosphere improved noticeably, and we finished the project on time.
all.zh: 氣氛明顯好轉，我們也準時完成了專案。

all.en: I realized that difficult people are sometimes just people having a difficult time.
all.zh: 我體會到，所謂難相處的人，有時只是正經歷難熬日子的人。

all.en: A month later, Mark and I were assigned to a much larger cross-department project together.
all.zh: 一個月後，馬克和我被指派一起負責一個更大型的跨部門專案。

all.en: This time, we set clear ground rules during the very first planning meeting.
all.zh: 這一次，我們在第一次規劃會議上就訂下了清楚的基本原則。

all.en: We agreed to share progress every Friday and to raise concerns gently and early.
all.zh: 我們約定每週五彼此分享進度，並且以溫和的方式儘早提出疑慮。

all.en: He surprised me by sending a kind note when he heard about my busy travel week.
all.zh: 當他得知我那週要忙著出差時，竟意外地寄了一張暖心的紙條給我。

all.en: I noticed that his sarcasm had been replaced by short, focused, and useful comments.
all.zh: 我發現他的嘲諷語氣已被簡短、聚焦且實用的評論所取代。

all.en: During a tense client call, we even covered for each other on tough questions.
all.zh: 在一次氣氛緊張的客戶電話中，我們甚至在棘手問題上互相補位。

all.en: Other teammates began to ask how we had transformed our working relationship so quickly.
all.zh: 其他同事開始好奇我們是如何這麼快就改變彼此的工作關係。

all.en: I told them honestly that one private conversation had changed everything between us.
all.zh: 我老實告訴他們，是一次私下的談話徹底改變了我們之間的一切。

all.en: At the project closing dinner, Mark raised a glass and publicly thanked me for my patience.
all.zh: 在專案結案晚宴上，馬克舉杯公開感謝我當初的耐心。

all.en: I smiled and thought about how trust, once rebuilt, could make any task feel lighter.
all.zh: 我微笑著心想，信任一旦重新建立，任何工作都會變得更輕鬆。

all.en: A few weeks later, Mark invited me to coffee again, this time without any tension.
all.zh: 幾週後，馬克又邀我喝咖啡，這次氣氛完全沒有緊張感。

all.en: He shared that his family situation had improved and thanked me for my patience.
all.zh: 他分享了家裡狀況已經好轉，並感謝我當時的耐心。

all.en: We started a small ritual of catching up every Monday over a quick coffee break.
all.zh: 我們開始了一個小儀式，每週一在短暫的咖啡時間敘敘舊。

all.en: Our supervisor noticed the change and asked us to co-lead a new training program.
all.zh: 主管注意到這個改變，邀請我們共同帶領一個新的培訓計畫。

all.en: We designed workshops on conflict resolution and shared our own honest experience.
all.zh: 我們設計了衝突化解的工作坊，並分享了我們自身真誠的經歷。

all.en: Younger colleagues found our story unusually relatable and asked many thoughtful questions.
all.zh: 年輕同事覺得我們的故事格外有共鳴，提出了許多深思熟慮的問題。

all.en: The program received positive reviews and was rolled out to two other departments.
all.zh: 這項計畫獲得正面評價，後來推廣到另外兩個部門。

all.en: Mark and I eventually became known as the unlikely problem-solving duo of our floor.
all.zh: 馬克和我最終成了樓層上那對出人意料的解決問題拍檔。

all.en: At the year-end review, our manager called us an example of professional maturity.
all.zh: 在年終檢討會上，主管稱我們是專業成熟的最佳示範。

all.en: I learned that turning a rival into an ally could be the most valuable career skill.
all.zh: 我體會到，把對手變成盟友，可能是最有價值的職場技能。

all.en: The next year, our company restructured, and Mark was promoted to a leadership role.
all.zh: 隔年，公司進行組織重整，馬克被升為管理職。

all.en: He surprised everyone by requesting that I join his team as his strategic partner.
all.zh: 他出乎所有人意料地要求我加入他的團隊，擔任他的策略夥伴。

all.en: We sat down for a long planning meeting on his very first day in the new position.
all.zh: 他上任的第一天，我們就坐下來開了一場長時間的規劃會議。

all.en: He admitted that without our coffee conversation, he might have left the company years ago.
all.zh: 他坦承，若沒有當年那次咖啡談話，他可能早在多年前就離開公司了。

all.en: I told him honestly that I had also nearly requested a transfer back then.
all.zh: 我老實告訴他，當年我也差一點申請調離到別的部門。

all.en: We laughed at how close we had come to never knowing each other's true strengths.
all.zh: 我們笑著感嘆，當初差一點就永遠錯過了解彼此真正長處的機會。

all.en: Together, we built a team culture based on early honesty and respectful, kind feedback.
all.zh: 我們攜手打造了一個以早期誠實與尊重、善意回饋為基礎的團隊文化。

all.en: Younger employees often asked us how to handle their own difficult coworkers wisely.
all.zh: 年輕員工常問我們，該如何明智地處理自己遇到的難相處同事。

all.en: We always answered the same way: invite them out for coffee, and truly listen.
all.zh: 我們總是給出相同的答案：請他們喝杯咖啡，然後真心地傾聽。

all.en: By winter, our team had the lowest turnover rate in the entire regional office.
all.zh: 到了冬天，我們團隊的離職率成為整個區域辦公室裡最低的。
